nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Ptiloprora
nodes.summary: Ptiloprora（Ptiloprora）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Leaden honeyeater、Yellowish-streaked honeyeater、Rufous-sided honeyeater等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-backed honeyeater
nodes.summary: The rufous-backed honeyeater (Ptiloprora guisei) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-backed honeyeater (Ptiloprora guisei) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.

nodes.name: Rufous-backed honeyeater
nodes.summary: Rufous-backed honeyeater（Ptiloprora guisei）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-backed honeyeater。
